title: Unable to retrieve multiple attachments from NocoDB
symptom: When attempting to fetch attachments from NocoDB, only one attachment is retrieved instead of all available attachments.
applies_when: Using HTTP node to fetch attachments
Multiple attachments exist in the NocoDB item
not_this_if: Only one attachment is present in the NocoDB item
root_cause: The HTTP node processes the data as a single item, which results in only one attachment being fetched. n8n needs to loop through each attachment to retrieve them all, which requires a split operation before the HTTP request.
fix_steps: Add a 'SplitInBatches' node before the HTTP node
Configure the 'SplitInBatches' node to split the attachments array
Connect the output of the 'SplitInBatches' node to the HTTP node
agent_instruction: Insert a 'SplitInBatches' node before the HTTP node to handle multiple attachments.
